title: Galle Face Green Sunset Spot
description: Great location to catch the sunset. Ideal place to review design proposals or read book chapters.

title: Colombo Office - Standup Meeting
description: Standup at 9 AM daily. Bring project documents and sprint boards.

title: Kandy Lake View Point
description: Peaceful lake walk. Stop here to outline the next chapters of the mobile app architecture documentation.
address: Kandy Lake Road, Kandy, Sri Lanka

title: Sigiriya Fortress Hike Info
description: Sigiriya is an ancient rock fortress. Bring lots of water and check weather reports before starting climb.
